title: R-LUME SUSPENSION
composition:
Each  5ml of R-Lume Susp contains :-

      Artemether 180mg + Lumefantrine 1080mg
description: R-LUME Suspension is an effective antimalarial formulation containing the combination of Artemether and Lumefantrine, recommended for the treatment of uncomplicated malaria caused by Plasmodium falciparum. Artemether acts rapidly to reduce the malaria parasite load, while Lumefantrine provides sustained action to eliminate residual parasites and prevent recurrence. This combination therapy offers fast symptom relief, high cure rates, and improved treatment outcomes. R-LUME Suspension is especially suitable for pediatric patients due to its easy-to-administer liquid formulation. It should be taken as prescribed by a healthcare professional, preferably with food or milk to enhance absorption and maximize effectiveness.

title: IZ – 500mg Tablets
composition:
Each film Coated tablet contains :-

    Azithromycin Dihydrate USP  
    Equivalent to Azithromycin…………………………… 500mg
description: IZ 500 Tablet (Azithromycin 500 mg) is a broad-spectrum macrolide antibiotic used for the treatment of various bacterial infections, including respiratory tract infections, tonsillitis, sinusitis, ear infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and certain sexually transmitted diseases. It works by inhibiting bacterial protein synthesis, thereby stopping the growth and spread of bacteria. IZ 500 offers the advantages of once-daily dosing, good tissue penetration, and a shorter treatment duration, which helps improve patient compliance. It should be taken only as prescribed by a healthcare professional, and the full course must be completed to prevent antibiotic resistance and recurrence of infection.

title: LEVORAY 500mg Tablets
composition:
Each film coated tablet contains: 
Levofloxacin Hemihydrate 
Equivalent to Levofloxacin………………………….… 500 mg
description: Levoray 500 Tablet contains Levofloxacin 500 mg, a broad-spectrum fluoroquinolone antibiotic used to treat a wide range of bacterial infections. It is effective in managing respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, gastrointestinal infections, and certain other bacterial diseases. Levofloxacin works by inhibiting bacterial DNA replication, leading to the destruction of susceptible bacteria. Levoray 500 offers excellent tissue penetration, convenient once-daily dosing, and high clinical efficacy. It should be used only under medical supervision and the full prescribed course should be completed to ensure successful treatment and help prevent antibiotic resistance.

title: FEKEY SYRUP
composition:
Each 5 mL Contains :-
Sodium Feredetate BP 
equivalent to elemental Iron………………………… ….33 mg 
Pyridoxine Hydrochloride BP ………………………….. 1.5 mg 
Cyanocobalamin BP (Vitamin B12)……………….. ….7.5 mcg 
Folic Acid BP ……………………………………………...... 1.5 mg
Flavoured syrup  Based……………………………………….q.s
description: FEKEY Syrup is a hematinic and nutritional supplement containing Sodium Feredetate, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12), and Folic Acid, formulated to prevent and treat iron deficiency anemia and nutritional deficiencies. It helps in the formation of healthy red blood cells, improves hemoglobin levels, and supports oxygen transport throughout the body. The combination of iron, folic acid, and essential B vitamins enhances erythropoiesis, reduces fatigue, weakness, and anemia-related symptoms, and promotes overall health and vitality. FEKEY Syrup is suitable for children, adults, pregnant women, and patients requiring nutritional supplementation under medical supervision.

title: CIPOTAX Tablets
composition:
Each film coated tablet contains:                                      Ciprofloxacin Hydrochloride BP  
Equivalent to Ciprofloxacin ……………………………    500 mg Tinidazole   BP………………………..……………………… 600 mg Excipient …………………………………………………………..q.s.
description: CIPOTAX Tablets is a combination antimicrobial formulation containing Ciprofloxacin and Tinidazole, used for the treatment of mixed bacterial and protozoal infections. Ciprofloxacin, a broad-spectrum fluoroquinolone antibiotic, effectively eliminates susceptible bacteria, while Tinidazole acts against protozoa and anaerobic bacteria. This dual-action therapy is commonly prescribed for gastrointestinal infections, acute diarrhea, dysentery, abdominal infections, gynecological infections, and mixed infections requiring broad antimicrobial coverage. CIPOTAX provides rapid symptom relief, high therapeutic efficacy, and convenient dosing. It should be taken as directed by a healthcare professional, and the full prescribed course should be completed to ensure effective treatment and prevent antimicrobial resistance.

title: ACOFAN Tablets
composition:
Each film coated tablet contains: 
Aceclofenac BP……………………………………….. 100 mg
description: ACOFAN® (Aceclofenac Tablets) is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) containing Aceclofenac, widely used to relieve pain, inflammation, and stiffness associated with musculoskeletal and joint disorders. It is indicated for conditions such as osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, back pain, sprains, and other inflammatory conditions. Aceclofenac works by inhibiting cyclooxygenase (COX) enzymes, reducing the production of prostaglandins responsible for pain and inflammation. ACOFAN provides effective, long-lasting pain relief with good gastrointestinal tolerability compared to some traditional NSAIDs, helping patients regain mobility, improve daily function, and enhance overall quality of life.

title: R-LUME 80mg Injection
composition:
Each  1ml of R-Lume Injection contains :-

      Artemether 80mg
description: R-LUME® Injection (Artemether Injection 80 mg/ml) is a fast-acting antimalarial indicated for the initial treatment of severe and complicated malaria, especially infections caused by Plasmodium falciparum. Administered via intramuscular injection, artemether rapidly reduces parasite load by generating free radicals that damage essential parasite proteins and membranes, leading to parasite death. Its rapid onset of action helps control severe symptoms and stabilize patients until oral antimalarial therapy can be initiated. R-LUME Injection is well tolerated, provides reliable efficacy, and plays a vital role in reducing malaria-related morbidity and mortality when used according to recommended treatment guidelines.

title: AMLOCLASS AT Tablets
composition:
Each tablet contains:-
 Amlodipine Besilate BP
Eq. to Amlodipine …………………………………………………5 mg  Atenolol BP…………………………………………………………. 50 mg.
Exipients……………………………………………………………..q.s
description: AMLOCLASS AT® Tablets (Amlodipine 5 mg + Atenolol 50 mg) is a fixed-dose combination indicated for the effective management of hypertension and chronic stable angina. It combines Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that relaxes blood vessels, with Atenolol, a selective beta-blocker that reduces heart rate and cardiac workload. This dual mechanism provides superior blood pressure control, improves myocardial oxygen balance, and reduces the risk of cardiovascular complications. AMLOCLASS AT offers convenient once-daily dosing, enhances patient compliance, and delivers sustained 24-hour blood pressure control, making it an effective choice for long-term cardiovascular protection and improved quality of life.

title: IPOZOLE 20mg Capsule
composition:
Each Hard gelatin capsule contains:
Omeprazole USP………20 mg (As Enteric Coated capsules) 
Excipients………………..q.s
description: IPOZOLE® Capsules (Omeprazole 20 mg) is a proton pump inhibitor (PPI) indicated for the treatment and prevention of acid-related gastrointestinal disorders, including gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), gastric and duodenal ulcers, erosive esophagitis, and Zollinger–Ellison syndrome. Omeprazole works by irreversibly inhibiting the gastric proton pump (H⁺/K⁺-ATPase), providing potent and long-lasting suppression of gastric acid secretion. IPOZOLE effectively relieves symptoms such as heartburn and acid reflux, promotes ulcer healing, and helps prevent recurrence. With convenient once-daily dosing, it offers reliable symptom control, improves patient comfort, and enhances overall gastrointestinal health and quality of life.

title: CEFEZONE 1G Injection
composition:
Each Vial Contains:-
Sterile Ceftriaxone Sodium…………………………...  USP
Equivalent to Anhydrous Ceftriaxone ……………….1000 mg
description: CEFEZONE® 1 g Injection (Ceftriaxone for Injection USP) is a third-generation cephalosporin antibiotic indicated for the treatment of a wide range of bacterial infections, including respiratory tract, urinary tract, skin and soft tissue, intra-abdominal, bone and joint infections, septicemia, and bacterial meningitis. It works by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis, leading to rapid bacterial death. CEFEZONE offers broad-spectrum antibacterial coverage, excellent tissue penetration, and a long elimination half-life that supports convenient once-daily dosing in many infections. Administered via IV or IM route, it provides reliable clinical efficacy, improves patient outcomes, and helps reduce infection-related complications.

title: FIZO 20mg Tablets
composition:
Each enteric-coated tablet contains:
Rabeprazole Sodium …………………………20 mg
Excipients………………………………………….q.s
description: FIZO® Tablets (Rabeprazole Sodium 20 mg) is a proton pump inhibitor (PPI) indicated for the treatment and prevention of acid-related gastrointestinal disorders, including gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), gastric and duodenal ulcers, erosive esophagitis, and Helicobacter pylori eradication when used in combination with appropriate antibiotics. Rabeprazole works by irreversibly inhibiting the gastric H⁺/K⁺-ATPase (proton pump), providing rapid, potent, and sustained suppression of gastric acid secretion. FIZO effectively relieves heartburn, acid reflux, and ulcer-related symptoms while promoting mucosal healing. With convenient once-daily dosing and excellent tolerability, FIZO improves patient comfort, supports long-term gastrointestinal health, and enhances quality of life.

title: ACUMOL Tablets
composition:
Each film Coated Tablets contains:-
Aceclofenac BP………………………………………. 100 mg 
Paracetamol BP ……………………………………… 500 mg
Excipients……………………………………………….q.s
description: ACUMOL® Tablets (Aceclofenac + Paracetamol) is a synergistic analgesic and anti-inflammatory combination indicated for the effective management of pain, inflammation, and fever associated with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, musculoskeletal disorders, dental pain, postoperative pain, and soft tissue injuries. Aceclofenac reduces inflammation by inhibiting cyclooxygenase (COX) enzymes, while Paracetamol provides rapid pain relief and antipyretic action through central mechanisms. ACUMOL offers fast and sustained relief from acute and chronic painful conditions, improves joint mobility and physical function, and is generally well tolerated. Its dual-action formula enhances patient comfort, accelerates recovery, and improves overall quality of life.

title: R -LUME 80mg/480mg Tablets
composition:
Each  coated tablet of R-Lume 80/480 contains :-

      Artemether 80mg + Lumifentron 480mg
description: R-LUME® 80/480 Tablets (Artemether 80 mg + Lumefantrine 480 mg) is a high-strength artemisinin-based combination therapy (ACT) indicated for the treatment of uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria, including infections caused by multidrug-resistant strains. Artemether rapidly reduces parasite burden through free radical-mediated parasite destruction, while lumefantrine, with its longer half-life, eliminates residual parasites and helps prevent recrudescence. This complementary dual mechanism ensures rapid symptom relief, high cure rates, and reduced risk of resistance. R-LUME 80/480 offers a convenient dosing regimen for adults, excellent tolerability, and reliable efficacy, supporting complete parasite clearance and improved patient recovery.

description: SIDEGRA® 50/100 Tablets (Sildenafil Citrate 50 mg & 100 mg) is a phosphodiesterase type-5 (PDE-5) inhibitor indicated for the treatment of erectile dysfunction (ED) in adult men. Sildenafil enhances the natural erectile response by inhibiting PDE-5, increasing cyclic guanosine monophosphate (cGMP) levels, and promoting smooth muscle relaxation with improved blood flow to the penile tissues during sexual stimulation. SIDEGRA helps achieve and maintain a firm erection, improves sexual performance, and enhances confidence and quality of life. Available in 50 mg and 100 mg strengths, it offers flexible dosing, rapid onset of action, and a well-established safety and efficacy profile when used as directed.

APPLIFT Syrup supports healthy growth in children, promotes recovery in convalescent patients, and helps restore energy and vitality in adults. With its pleasant taste and easy-to-administer liquid formulation, APPLIFT is suitable for patients of all ages, helping improve appetite, nutritional intake, physical strength, and overall well-being.

description: KIDJOY® Calmant Gripe Water is a gentle pediatric formulation designed to relieve common digestive discomforts in infants and young children, including colic, gas, bloating, hiccups, and stomach cramps. Its soothing blend of carefully selected ingredients helps relax the digestive tract, promotes comfortable digestion, and reduces fussiness and crying associated with gastrointestinal discomfort. KIDJOY Gripe Water is easy to administer, pleasant tasting, and suitable for routine infant care when used as directed. By providing fast, gentle relief from tummy troubles, KIDJOY helps babies feel more comfortable, supports restful sleep, and offers reassurance and convenience for parents and caregivers.

title: AMLOCLASS 5mg/10mg Tablets
composition:

description: AMLOCLASS® 5/10 Tablets (Amlodipine Besilate 5 mg & 10 mg) is a long-acting calcium channel blocker indicated for the treatment of hypertension and chronic stable or vasospastic angina. Amlodipine works by relaxing vascular smooth muscle, causing peripheral vasodilation that lowers blood pressure and improves blood flow to the heart. This reduces cardiac workload, relieves angina symptoms, and decreases the risk of cardiovascular complications such as stroke and heart attack. Available in 5 mg and 10 mg strengths, AMLOCLASS offers flexible dose titration, convenient once-daily administration, sustained 24-hour blood pressure control, excellent tolerability, and effective long-term cardiovascular protection for a wide range of patients.

title: IMUCLAVE 1125mg Tablets
composition: Each film coated tablet Contains:                                          Amoxicillin Trihydrate BP                                                                            eq. to Amoxicillin…………………………………………….1000 mg                                                             Diluted BP Potassium Clavulanate                                                          eq. to Clavulanic Acid……………………………………..125 mg Excipients……………………………………………………..         q.s
description: IMUCLAV® 1125 Tablets (Amoxicillin 1000 mg + Potassium Clavulanate 125 mg) is a broad-spectrum antibiotic combination indicated for the treatment of susceptible bacterial infections, including respiratory tract, ear, nose and throat, urinary tract, skin and soft tissue, dental, and bone and joint infections. Amoxicillin inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while clavulanate protects it from degradation by beta-lactamase enzymes, extending its antibacterial spectrum. This synergistic combination provides reliable coverage against beta-lactamase–producing bacteria, ensuring effective infection control. IMUCLAV 1125 offers high clinical efficacy, excellent tissue penetration, and convenient dosing, promoting faster recovery, reducing complications, and improving overall patient outcomes.

title: AFSC KIT Tablets
composition:
Each Combikit Contains :-

description: AFSC KIT® (Secnidazole + Azithromycin + Fluconazole) is a convenient fixed-dose combination therapy indicated for the syndromic management of mixed genital and reproductive tract infections, including bacterial, protozoal, and fungal infections. Secnidazole eliminates anaerobic bacteria and Trichomonas vaginalis, Azithromycin provides broad-spectrum antibacterial coverage against susceptible sexually transmitted pathogens, and Fluconazole effectively treats Candida infections. This triple-action combination offers comprehensive coverage in a single treatment regimen, improving patient compliance and clinical outcomes. AFSC KIT helps achieve rapid symptom relief, effective eradication of causative organisms, reduced recurrence, and supports better reproductive and sexual health when used as prescribed.

description: CEFEZONE-S® Injection 1.5 g (Ceftriaxone 1 g + Sulbactam 0.5 g) is a broad-spectrum injectable antibiotic combination indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe bacterial infections, including respiratory tract, urinary tract, intra-abdominal, skin and soft tissue, bone and joint infections, septicemia, and gynecological infections. Ceftriaxone inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while Sulbactam is a beta-lactamase inhibitor that protects ceftriaxone from enzymatic degradation, extending its antibacterial spectrum against resistant organisms. Administered via IV or IM route, CEFEZONE-S provides excellent tissue penetration, reliable clinical efficacy, and convenient once-daily dosing in many cases, promoting faster recovery and improved patient outcomes.

description: Kolicure Drops (Simethicone + Dill Oil + Fennel Oil) is a gentle pediatric formulation specially designed to relieve infantile colic, gas, bloating, abdominal discomfort, and excessive crying caused by trapped air in the digestive tract. Simethicone helps break down gas bubbles for easy elimination, while Dill Oil and Fennel Oil provide natural carminative and antispasmodic effects that soothe the digestive system. Kolicure Drops offer fast and effective relief from tummy discomfort, promote comfortable digestion, and help infants feed and sleep better. With its pleasant taste and easy-to-administer drop formulation, Kolicure Drops support infant comfort and provide reassurance for parents and caregivers.

Atorvastatin effectively lowers LDL cholesterol and triglycerides while increasing HDL cholesterol, helping reduce the risk of heart attack, stroke, and other cardiovascular events. Available in 10 mg and 20 mg strengths, ATROCLASS offers flexible dose titration to meet individual patient needs. With convenient once-daily dosing, proven efficacy, and excellent tolerability, ATROCLASS supports long-term lipid control, cardiovascular protection, and improved overall heart health.

description: LAPIPERA® 4.5 g Injection (Piperacillin 4 g + Tazobactam 0.5 g) is a broad-spectrum antibiotic combination indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe bacterial infections, including hospital-acquired pneumonia, complicated urinary tract and intra-abdominal infections, skin and soft tissue infections, gynecological infections, and septicemia. Piperacillin inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while Tazobactam is a beta-lactamase inhibitor that protects piperacillin from enzymatic degradation, extending its activity against resistant organisms. Administered by intravenous infusion, LAPIPERA provides broad antimicrobial coverage, excellent tissue penetration, and reliable clinical efficacy, helping achieve rapid infection control, reduce complications, and improve patient outcomes.

description: METCLASS SR® 500/SR 1000 Tablets (Metformin Hydrochloride Sustained Release 500 mg & 1000 mg) is a sustained-release antidiabetic medication indicated for the management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus alongside diet and exercise. Metformin reduces hepatic glucose production, improves insulin sensitivity, and enhances peripheral glucose uptake without stimulating insulin secretion, resulting in a low risk of hypoglycemia. The sustained-release formulation provides prolonged glycemic control with improved gastrointestinal tolerability and convenient once-daily dosing, promoting better patient adherence. Available in 500 mg and 1000 mg strengths, METCLASS SR effectively helps achieve optimal blood glucose control, supports long-term metabolic health, and reduces the risk of diabetes-related complications.

Amoxicillin inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while Clavulanic Acid is a beta-lactamase inhibitor that protects amoxicillin from enzymatic degradation, extending its activity against resistant bacteria. Administered by IV injection or infusion, IMUCLAV 1.2 g provides rapid and effective infection control, excellent tissue penetration, reliable clinical efficacy, and supports faster recovery with improved patient outcomes.

description: R-LUME® 20/120 & 40/240 Tablets (Artemether + Lumefantrine) are artemisinin-based combination therapies (ACTs) indicated for the treatment of uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria, including infections caused by multidrug-resistant strains. Artemether rapidly reduces parasite burden through free radical-mediated parasite destruction, while Lumefantrine, with its longer half-life, eliminates residual parasites and helps prevent recrudescence. This complementary dual-action provides rapid fever clearance, high cure rates, and reduces the risk of resistance development. Available in 20/120 mg and 40/240 mg strengths, R-LUME offers age-appropriate dosing, excellent tolerability, and reliable efficacy, ensuring complete parasite clearance, faster recovery, and improved patient outcomes.

Meropenem works by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis, resulting in rapid bactericidal activity against a wide range of Gram-positive, Gram-negative, and anaerobic bacteria. Available in 500 mg and 1 g strengths, MEROCLASS provides excellent tissue penetration, proven clinical efficacy, and reliable intravenous therapy for critically ill patients, helping achieve rapid infection control and improved clinical outcomes.

Available in 1 mg, 2 mg, and 4 mg strengths, GLIMSY allows flexible dose titration according to individual patient needs. It effectively lowers fasting and postprandial blood glucose levels, supports long-term diabetes management, and helps reduce the risk of diabetes-related complications while offering convenient dosing, proven efficacy, and good patient tolerability.

Their antioxidant and rejuvenating properties contribute to overall well-being and reduce fatigue associated with stress and an active lifestyle. Enriched with carefully selected herbal ingredients, it helps loosen mucus, ease congestion, and support healthy respiratory function. Its natural expectorant and soothing properties help calm persistent coughing, reduce throat discomfort, and promote easier breathing. The sugar-free variant is suitable for individuals who prefer reduced sugar intake, including many people with diabetes, when used under medical guidance. Cough-Off Syrup is gentle enough for daily use as directed and supports faster recovery while maintaining overall respiratory comfort and wellness.

title: METCLASS G1/G2 Tablets
description: Metclass G1 and Metclass G2 are oral antidiabetic tablets formulated to help achieve effective glycemic control in adults with Type 2 diabetes mellitus. They combine Glimepiride with Metformin Hydrochloride to provide dual-action blood glucose management by enhancing insulin release and reducing hepatic glucose production while improving insulin sensitivity. These formulations help control both fasting and postprandial blood sugar levels, support long-term HbA1c reduction, and may lower the risk of diabetes-related complications when used alongside a healthy diet and regular exercise. Metclass G1 and G2 should be taken only under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.

description: IZ-200 is an Azithromycin for Oral Suspension USP specially formulated for pediatric use to treat a wide range of bacterial infections. It belongs to the macrolide class of antibiotics and works by inhibiting bacterial protein synthesis, effectively stopping the growth of susceptible bacteria. IZ-200 is commonly prescribed for respiratory tract infections, ear, nose and throat infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and certain other bacterial illnesses. Its pleasant lime flavor and easy-to-reconstitute suspension improve compliance in children. IZ-200 should be used only under the supervision of a qualified healthcare professional and completed as prescribed to ensure effective treatment and reduce antibiotic resistance.

Suitable for adults, PKG Cream supports quicker recovery and improved daily movement when used regularly as directed by a healthcare professional.

description: IMUCLAV-1000 is a broad-spectrum antibiotic tablet containing Amoxicillin 875 mg and Potassium Clavulanate 125 mg, formulated to treat a wide range of bacterial infections. This combination effectively kills susceptible bacteria while clavulanic acid inhibits beta-lactamase enzymes, helping overcome bacterial resistance and enhancing the antibiotic's effectiveness. IMUCLAV-1000 is commonly prescribed for respiratory tract infections, ear, nose and throat infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, dental infections, and bone and joint infections. It helps provide rapid symptom relief and promotes faster recovery when taken as prescribed. IMUCLAV-1000 should be used only under the supervision of a qualified healthcare professional.
